title: Variable inverter based power control
abstract: A DC power output system may achieve variable output power by paring a variable inverter with a rectifier. DC power output system may implement DC power adjustment at the output of the rectifier least in part by varying the power supplied from the variable inverter to the rectifier.
claims: 1. A system including: an output port; a variable inverter; a rectifier coupled between the output port and the variable inverter, the rectifier configured to convert AC power of the variable inverter to DC power at the output port; and output-control circuitry configured to: receive an indication of a change in target DC power output for the output port; and while the rectifier remains unadjusted responsive to the change, send a power control signal to drive the variable inverter to a target AC power to account for the change in the target DC power output.
